canonical_definition: A clinical benchmark comprising 962 QA pairs linked to distinct patients' discharge summaries from MIMIC-IV EHR, evaluated in both open-ended and multi-choice formats.
papers: EHRNoteQA: An LLM Benchmark for Real-World Clinical Practice Using Discharge Summaries
Instruction Tuning Large Language Models to Understand Electronic Health Records
